positive: Minimalist geometric illustration of an abstract forest scene. The main subjects are highly stylized, interconnected trees and forest canopy, rendered with bold, solid silhouettes and clean negative space. Use a limited color palette of deep teal, burnt orange, and cream white. The composition must be central, highly scalable, and designed to look excellent on apparel fabric. Incorporate repeating, complementary geometric patterns into the foliage and ground elements, evoking depth and rhythm. Vector art style, flat design, high contrast, poster art, perfect symmetry, clean edges, print-ready.
